description:
Check the drug-drug interaction safety between the cancer drug 'Vemurafenib' and the antipsychotic 'Quetiapine' using the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app. Document the findings in a text file at /sdcard/tasks/vemurafenib_quetiapine_check.txt containing exactly four lines:
Line 1: Cancer Drug Name (Vemurafenib)
Line 2: Co-medication Name (Quetiapine)
Line 3: The observed interaction color (Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, or Grey)
Line 4: A brief snippet of the clinical risk mentioned in the detailed clinical recommendation.
